title: No, Trump didn't say drive downhill. The gas prices post is fake
shortDescription: President Donald Trump has commented on gas prices several times since the war in Iran started. One fake post and one old Tweet are going viral.

title: Live updates and results on key elections in Ohio and Indiana
shortDescription: Follow along live as voters in Indiana and Ohio weigh in on key races.

title: Trump shows kids the 'Trump dance' moves
shortDescription: President Donald Trump taught high school athletes his favorite "YMCA" dance on the White House lawn.

title: Remember running a mile at school? Trump reinstates physical fitness awards
shortDescription: 'I work out so much, like about one minute a day max – if I’m lucky,' the president said, poking fun at his own athletic activities.

title: Trump admin wants to push bison from public lands in Montana. What to know
shortDescription: The proposal would force a non-profit to move hundreds of bison from Montana's grasslands.

title: Trump urges Iran to surrender during ceasefire
shortDescription: President Trump urges Iran to surrender after Iran fired on ships in the Strait of Hormuz during a fragile ceasefire.

title: Trump still has strong support in Georgia ahead of midterm primaries
shortDescription: A new poll from the Atlanta Journal-Constitution found a high level of support for President Trump just before midterm primary voting.

title: What is the condition of the man Secret Service shot in Washington DC?
shortDescription: A Secret Service officer shot a man on the National Mall near the Washington Monument on Monday. Here's the latest on the suspect.

title: Trump says Hormuz Strait is 'mini war.' Hegseth calls it 'temporary'
shortDescription: The U.S. military's new effort to break Iran's control over the Strait of Hormuz is a "temporary mission," Pentagon chief Pete Hegseth told reporters.

title: New poll shows Paxton ahead of Cornyn in Texas for US Senate seat
shortDescription: A new poll shows Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton leading Sen. John Cornyn in the GOP primary runoff for U.S. Senate weeks before the election.

title: What is Trump saying about gas prices? Here's the latest
shortDescription: On May 5, the national average of gas was $4.48 per gallon, up from $4.18 last week, the AAA reported. Here's what the president is saying about it.

title: Trump admin investigating all women's college over trans students
shortDescription: The investigation will determine if Smith College violated Title IX by allowing transgender women to attend the women's college, the department said.

title: Trump expects gas prices to 'drop' after war
shortDescription: President Trump gives update on gas prices, expecting a substantial drop after the Iran war.

title: Atlanta voters head back to the polls this summer for special election
shortDescription: U.S. House Representative David Scott died last month, and now a special election has been called for his Atlanta-area seat.

title: Trump's national prayer event is largely focused on one religion
shortDescription: Of the 15 faith leaders participating in the May 17 Rededicate 250 event, 14 are Christian.

title: Makers of US flags urge Trump to impose tariffs on Chinese imports
shortDescription: Makers of U.S. flags are among the advocates for raising tariffs on foreign imports to combat what they contend is unfair trade from overseas.

title: Questions swirl around White House Correspondents' dinner security
shortDescription: One week after a gunman tried to breach dinner and allegedly kill President Trump and others, key questions remain about various security agencies.

title: Ramaswamy’s personality, Trump’s revenge will shape OH, IN races
shortDescription: Ohio and Indiana primary voters hit the polls on May 5 and will test whether President Donald Trump's grip on the Republican Party is slipping.
